scope.target: Roadmap, backlog, external-review intake, release runbook, and model-handoff safeguards
constraints: Keep v0.4.2 hotfix separate from v0.5.0 contract additions
Do not require external reviewers to use repository-owned templates

steps: Create R042-005, REL-001, and HANDOFF-001 backlog items
Reconcile v0.4.2 publication and v0.5.0 activation state
Define raw external review intake and normalization boundaries
Record REL-001, HANDOFF-001, and ENF-001 relationships
validation: backlog index and roadmap relationship checks
execution.last_completed_step: Reconciled the live roadmap/backlog and adopted the external-review intake contract.
execution.next_action: Verify relationships and release gates independently in R042005-004.

results.summary: Added R042-005, REL-001, and HANDOFF-001; updated v0.4.2 and v0.5.0 gate truth; separated release mechanics from ENF-001; and made external-review normalization the receiving repository's responsibility.
results.residual_risk: REL-001 and HANDOFF-001 are planned v0.5.0 release blockers; their mechanical enforcement is not implemented by this hotfix.
